title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 52.380 - Bond, amount, how set
text:
52.380.  Bond, amount, how set. — The bond of the county collector in all counties of the first class not having a charter form of government and in all counties of the second class shall be not less than fifty thousand dollars nor more than seven hundred and fifty thousand dollars; the amount of the bond shall be fixed by the county commission; the cost of the bond shall be paid out of the general revenue fund of the county; and the bond shall otherwise be executed and subject to the provisions of this chapter.
(RSMo 1939 § 13911, A.L. 1973 H.B. 644) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 12248
